requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 Evidence for Bulgaria PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——保加利亚光伏逆变器IEC 62920和IEC 61000证据
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——保加利亞光伏逆變器IEC 62920和IEC 61000證據

summary.en: Bulgaria PV inverter EMC expectations should be prepared on an IEC/EN basis because BDS (Bulgarian Institute for Standardization) adopts EN/IEC standards, and project specifications for grid-connected PV commonly reference IEC-family inverter evidence under the EU EMC Directive 2014/30/EU. The practical EMC package should include IEC 62920 for PV power conversion equipment and applicable IEC 61000-series evidence for emissions, immunity, harmonics, surge, voltage dips, and power quality. For ESO grid-connected projects, harmonic and conducted-emission evidence should be tied to the actual inverter model, rating, and configuration. Bulgaria uses a 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid — EMC and harmonic results obtained only under China 220/380 V conditions should be reviewed for applicability before submission to Bulgarian authorities.
summary.zh: 保加利亚光伏逆变器EMC要求应按IEC/EN体系准备，因为BDS（保加利亚标准化研究所）采用EN/IEC标准，并网光伏项目规格通常在欧盟EMC指令2014/30/EU框架下引用IEC系列逆变器证据。实际EMC包应包括面向光伏功率变换设备的IEC 62920，以及适用的IEC 61000系列发射、抗扰度、谐波、浪涌、电压暂降和电能质量证据。对于ESO并网项目，谐波和传导发射证据应对应实际逆变器型号、功率等级和配置。保加利亚电网为230/400 V、50 Hz，仅在中国220/380 V条件下取得的EMC和谐波结果，在提交保加利亚主管机构前应审查其适用性。
summary.zht: 保加利亞光伏逆變器EMC要求應按IEC/EN體系準備，因為BDS（保加利亞標準化研究所）採用EN/IEC標準，併網光伏項目規格通常在歐盟EMC指令2014/30/EU框架下引用IEC系列逆變器證據。實際EMC包應包括面向光伏功率轉換設備的IEC 62920，以及適用的IEC 61000系列發射、抗擾度、諧波、浪湧、電壓暫降和電能品質證據。對於ESO併網項目，諧波和傳導發射證據應對應實際逆變器型號、功率等級和配置。保加利亞電網為230/400 V、50 Hz，僅在中國220/380 V條件下取得的EMC和諧波結果，在提交保加利亞主管機構前應審查其適用性。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility test, immunity, harmonic, surge, voltage-dip, and power-quality standards as applicable to the inverter configuration
Directive 2014/30/EU (EMC Directive) — mandatory for CE marking in Bulgaria as EU member state
BDS standards adoption and project specification requirements where applicable
ESO grid-connection review requirements for power quality and harmonic performance

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence commonly relies on GB/T 37408-2021 and related domestic EMC test reports from CNAS-accredited laboratories. These reports can be useful engineering background but are not automatically equivalent to IEC 62920 or the IEC 61000-series evidence requested by a Bulgarian project owner, BDS conformity route, EWRC review, or ESO grid-connection process. China test conditions are normally aligned with the China 220/380 V, 50 Hz baseline, while Bulgaria uses 230/400 V at the same frequency.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC证据通常依赖GB/T 37408-2021及来自CNAS认可实验室的相关国内EMC测试报告。这些报告可作为工程背景，但不能自动等同于保加利亚项目业主、BDS合格评定路径、EWRC审查或ESO并网流程要求的IEC 62920或IEC 61000系列证据。中国测试条件通常对应中国220/380 V、50 Hz基准，而保加利亚在相同频率下使用230/400 V。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC證據通常依賴GB/T 37408-2021及來自CNAS認可實驗室的相關國內EMC測試報告。這些報告可作為工程背景，但不能自動等同於保加利亞項目業主、BDS合格評定路徑、EWRC審查或ESO併網流程要求的IEC 62920或IEC 61000系列證據。中國測試條件通常對應中國220/380 V、50 Hz基準，而保加利亞在相同頻率下使用230/400 V。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CNAS-accredited domestic EMC test reports under China standard scopes

gap.en: Gap: China-only EMC certificates under GB/T 37408 do not automatically satisfy Bulgaria IEC/EN-based project expectations or EU EMC Directive requirements. Exporters should obtain IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000-series reports for the specific model or family, confirm whether harmonics and conducted-emission results remain valid at 230/400 V, and provide surge, earthing, shielding, and enclosure documentation suitable for Bulgarian installation conditions. Where ESO or the project owner specifies harmonic limits or power-quality measurements, test reports should be mapped clause-by-clause to that requirement. Bulgarian-language documentation may be required by local project owners.
gap.zh: 差距：仅依据GB/T 37408的中国EMC证书不能自动满足保加利亚IEC/EN体系项目要求或欧盟EMC指令要求。出口商应取得针对特定型号或系列的IEC 62920及适用IEC 61000系列报告，确认谐波和传导发射结果在230/400 V下是否仍有效，并提供适合保加利亚安装条件的浪涌、接地、屏蔽和外壳文件。若ESO或项目业主规定谐波限值或电能质量测量，应将测试报告逐条映射至该要求。当地项目业主可能要求提供保加利亚语文件。
gap.zht: 差距：僅依據GB/T 37408的中國EMC證書不能自動滿足保加利亞IEC/EN體系項目要求或歐盟EMC指令要求。出口商應取得針對特定型號或系列的IEC 62920及適用IEC 61000系列報告，確認諧波和傳導發射結果在230/400 V下是否仍有效，並提供適合保加利亞安裝條件的浪湧、接地、屏蔽和外殼文件。若ESO或項目業主規定諧波限值或電能品質測量，應將測試報告逐條映射至該要求。當地項目業主可能要求提供保加利亞語文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory under EU EMC Directive 2014/30/EU for CE marking in Bulgaria; project-specific and effectively mandatory where BDS, EWRC, ESO, or project-owner documentation calls for IEC EMC and power-quality evidence
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 37408 EMC evidence is a China domestic voluntary or certification-programme baseline and is not a Bulgarian IEC/EN evidence substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Bulgaria PV inverter EMC as an IEC/EN evidence package, not a China GB/T certificate transfer. Prepare IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000-series reports for the exact inverter model, review harmonic and EMC applicability at Bulgaria's 230/400 V 50 Hz grid voltage, and confirm any BDS, EWRC, ESO, or project-owner EMC requirements before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 保加利亚光伏逆变器EMC应按IEC/EN证据包处理，而不是直接转移中国GB/T证书。请为准确逆变器型号准备IEC 62920及适用IEC 61000系列报告，审查谐波和EMC结果在保加利亚230/400 V、50 Hz电网电压下的适用性，并在出货前确认任何BDS、EWRC、ESO及项目业主EMC要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 保加利亞光伏逆變器EMC應按IEC/EN證據包處理，而不是直接轉移中國GB/T證書。請為準確逆變器型號準備IEC 62920及適用IEC 61000系列報告，審查諧波和EMC結果在保加利亞230/400 V、50 Hz電網電壓下的適用性，並在出貨前確認任何BDS、EWRC、ESO及項目業主EMC要求。
